prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年最低位次分别为约1299名、221名、348名、228名；2021年数据口径差异较大，2022年以来位次在200–350区间波动，2025年基准约228名，近年整体呈高位稳定态势；该校在天津综合类招生计划：2021年18人、2022年13人、2024年13人、2025年12人；2026年计划13人，较2025年小幅扩招1人，扩招幅度约8.3%，对竞争略有缓解但影响有限。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2021–2026年稳定第4名，属全国顶尖高校层次，报考热度长期处于高位；2026年声誉评价偏负面，主要涉及学术不端（撤稿量较高）及校园安全事件，但均为个案层面，未动摇学校整体顶尖声誉；抖音热度为较热（总排名第42/106），短视频曝光量中等偏上；历史投档异常方面，2021年河南理科投档线曾为华五倒数第一，但属个别省份现象，对天津考生影响有限；第五轮学科评估中拥有28个A-及以上学科，其中计算机科学与技术、机械工程、材料科学与工程、生物学、工商管理、管理科学与工程等为A+，学科实力极强，对高分考生吸引力持续强劲。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 2026年相关工科/信息类专业热度持续偏高，人工智能、计算机等方向社会关注度旺盛；天津2026年考生总数约82000人（较2025年71938人增长约14%），竞争加剧；上海交通大学位于上海市（非本省），在天津招生占比约1.5%–2.4%（2021–2025年），属跨省招生，无本地倾斜；上海作为一线城市对考生有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次228名、2026年计划小幅扩招（12→13人）使位次数字略增大、天津考生总数显著增加（竞争加剧）、学校顶尖层次与优势学科维持强吸引力，以及声誉偏负面带来的轻微抑制效应，预计2026年最低位次较2025年小幅后移，预测最低位次约249名，区间221–277名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 电子信息类（计算机永强试验班）
- 人工智能（拔尖英才试点班）
- 电子信息类（IEEE试点班）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 理科试验班类（数学方向）
- 法学试验班（涉外法治特班）
- 金融学（金融学、计算机双学士学位项目）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 理科试验班类（物理方向）
- 机械类（钱学森工程科学试点班）
- 经济管理试验班。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间221–277名内，建议以二档专业为主力填报、一档王牌专业冲刺、三档专业保底；位次明显优于区间下限（如进入200名以内）可重点冲击一档的计算机永强试验班或人工智能拔尖英才试点班；位次接近区间上限（270名左右）建议以二档的理科试验班（数学方向）或法学试验班为核心选择。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings were approximately 1299, 221, 348, and 228 respectively; the 2021 data has a significant difference in caliber, and since 2022, rankings have fluctuated in the 200–350 range, with a baseline of about 228 in 2025, showing a stable high-level trend in recent years; the university's enrollment plan for comprehensive subjects in Tianjin: 18 in 2021, 13 in 2022, 13 in 2024, 12 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 13, a slight increase of 1 compared to 2025, an expansion rate of about 8.3%, which slightly eases competition but has limited impact.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985 Project, 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; ranked 4th stably in the Soft Science China University Rankings from 2021 to 2026, belonging to the top-tier national universities, with consistently high application popularity; the reputation evaluation for 2026 is slightly negative, mainly involving academic misconduct (high retraction volume) and campus safety incidents, but these are at the individual case level and have not shaken the overall top-tier reputation; Douyin popularity is relatively hot (overall rank 42/106), with medium-to-high short video exposure; in terms of historical admission anomalies, the 2021 Henan science admission line was once the lowest among the Huawu Five, but this is an individual provincial phenomenon with limited impact on Tianjin candidates; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, it has 28 A- and above disciplines, including Computer Science and Technology, Mechanical Engineering, Materials Science and Engineering, Biology, Business Administration, Management Science and Engineering as A+, with extremely strong disciplinary strength, maintaining strong appeal to high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2026, the popularity of related engineering/information majors remains relatively high, with social attention to directions such as artificial intelligence and computer science being strong; the total number of candidates in Tianjin in 2026 is about 82,000 (an increase of about 14% from 71,938 in 2025), intensifying competition; Shanghai Jiao Tong University is located in Shanghai (not in the province), with enrollment in Tianjin accounting for about 1.5%–2.4% (2021–2025), belonging to cross-provincial enrollment, with no local preference; Shanghai, as a first-tier city, has a strong appeal to candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 228, the slight expansion of the 2026 plan (12→13 people) causing a slight increase in ranking numbers, a significant increase in the total number of Tianjin candidates (intensified competition), the university's top-tier level and advantageous disciplines maintaining strong appeal, and the slight inhibitory effect of a negative reputation, it is expected that the minimum ranking in 2026 will slightly shift backward compared to 2025, with a predicted minimum ranking of about 249, in the range of 221–277.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Electronic Information (Computer Yongqiang Pilot Class)
- Artificial Intelligence (Top Talent Pilot Class)
- Electronic Information (IEEE Pilot Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Science Pilot Class (Mathematics Direction)
- Law Pilot Class (International Rule of Law Special Class)
- Finance (Finance, Computer Science Dual Degree Program).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Science Pilot Class (Physics Direction)
- Mechanical (Qian Xuesen Engineering Science Pilot Class)
- Economics and Management Pilot Class.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If the ranking is within the predicted range of 221–277, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 flagship majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety; if the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 200), focus on impacting Tier 1's Computer Yongqiang Pilot Class or Artificial Intelligence Top Talent Pilot Class; if the ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (around 270), it is recommended to choose Tier 2's Science Pilot Class (Mathematics Direction) or Law Pilot Class as the core choice.
